Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Oooh, he did it! What a smart dog.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}He was passing by just a little while ago.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You know how to say hi, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}You know how to say hi, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I've seen him sitting by the steps of the shrine.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Oh, this dog still goes on walks all by himself?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}He used to belong to the priest at the Naganaki Shrine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Every afternoon, the two of them went this way for a walk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}So that's what he was doing here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}That is, until the priest passed away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Oh, you haven't heard the story?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}I think it was about six months ago.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}The priest was hit by a car while walking his dog. He didn't survive.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Ever since then, that dog has continued to go on walks, always stopping to sit by the site of the accident.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}But he refuses to let anyone take him in. Why, just the other day, my son—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 10}Oh my goodness, look at the time! I must be going! My son will be home soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Aww, you're such a loyal dog! Good boy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}More importantly, isn't the chairman coming today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}We should probably go get ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Yeah, you're right. See you later, Koro-chan.[n]{f 1 1}
